core_payload.content:
# Capsule Graph Maintenance Synthesis Evolution

## 1. Role
Capsule Graph Maintenance Synthesis Evolution owns the growth pressure of the graph where strong regions should become clearer structure. It keeps resonance clustering, void mapping, synthesis opportunities, and graph evolution together so maintenance can produce better topology instead of only repairing damage.

## 2. Synthesis Evolution Surface
This sub-hub groups `n-infinity.gardener` and `n-infinity.innovator`. Together they define how high-signal regions are cultivated, how new structure is proposed, and how knowledge voids become future excavation targets rather than silent absences.

## 3. Operating Boundary
This sub-hub does not own contradiction debate, direct shape repair, or the runtime jobs that carry maintenance work forward. Those responsibilities belong to `epistemic-arbitration`, `topology-pressure`, and `runtime-jobs`.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Capsule Graph Maintenance Synthesis Evolution groups the graph-growth surfaces of upkeep: N-Infinity Gardener and Innovator. It keeps resonance clustering, void mapping, synthesis opportunities, and graph evolution together so maintenance can produce better structure instead of only repairing damage. This boundary matters because long-term graph health depends on cultivating high-signal regions and making missing knowledge explicit, not only on contradiction repair or cleanup. It gives maintenance one seam for constructive evolution.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted during Capsule Graph Maintenance decomposition to isolate resonance clustering, void mapping, and constructive synthesis pressure.
